# Buy WBTC

> Buy WBTC when you need Bitcoin value inside Ethereum-style smart contracts, with clear routes, contracts, and costs.

## Key facts
- Token: WBTC, a wrapped token representing Bitcoin value on smart-contract chains
- Backing / peg: Targets a 1:1 reserve relationship with BTC held by authorized custodians; it is not native BTC
- Convert: Swap existing assets for WBTC, withdraw from an exchange, or redeem through merchant/custodian channels
- Networks: Project documentation lists native contracts on Ethereum, Solana, TRON, BNB Chain, Base, Kava, and Osmosis
- Costs: Gas plus approval, trading fee, spread, withdrawal charge, and DEX price impact where applicable
- Verify: Check the chain ID and contract address, not the ticker; Ethereum Mainnet is chain ID 1

- [What is Buy WBTC?](https://buy-wbtc.github.io/#what)

- [Swapping it on a DEX](https://buy-wbtc.github.io/#swap)
- [The token vs its native asset](https://buy-wbtc.github.io/#vs)
- [Costs and gas](https://buy-wbtc.github.io/#fees)
- [Is Buy WBTC safe?](https://buy-wbtc.github.io/#safety)
- [Problems and fixes](https://buy-wbtc.github.io/#troubleshoot)
- [FAQ](https://buy-wbtc.github.io/#faq)
